title: Nemesis Now Sooky Witches Familiar Black Cat and Crescent Moon Figurine 11.5cm, Resin, Witches Familiar Cat Figurine, Sooky Figurine, Witchy Gift, Cast in the Finest Resin, Lovingly Hand-Painted
features: Witches Familiar Black Cat and Crescent Moon Figurine: From alternative brand Nemesis Now comes this charming cat figurine

Sooky Figurine: Sooky sits in a purple crescent moon, which is sat between the branches of a robust tree. With a purple Witches hat on her head, she is ready to filter the spiritual energy of the moon
Witchy Gift: The perfect gift for the charming witch in your life or addition to your witchy collection
Cast in the Finest Resin & Lovingly Hand-Painted: This figurine is cast in high-quality resin before being painstakingly hand-painted
Cats: With exclusively designed Nemesis Now pieces from our own design team and figurines from magical artist Lisa Parker, there are tonnes of tantalising Tabby's to get your claws on
description: From the manufacturer Wiccan & Witchcraft Collection We'll put a spell on you with our vast range of witching and wiccan goods! Featuring figurines, doormats, trinket boxes, and much more, they are perfect for letting visitors know that you may have powers beyond what can be directly seen. Pentagram Raven Box Shaped into a Wiccan pentagram, this box features a variety of witchcraft symbols both inside and out. On the lid of the box sits the skull of a raven, which can be lifted to reveal your most prized possessions. Cast in the finest resin before being expertly hand-painted, this box makes the perfect addition to any gothic collection. Mischievous Familiar Sitting snug inside an old heeled boot, the little black kitty wears a crooked black witches hat whilst clutching onto the laces of the boot. Cast in high-quality resin before being hand-painted this adorable figurine would make the perfect gift for any cat lover. Emerald Cauldron Backflow Incense Burner A quirky little cauldron mounted on top of burning logs, with a deadly purple potion brewing away. Positioned in the centre is a hole perfect for holding one of our backflow incense cones. Cast in the finest resin before being hand-painted, this incense burner will make the perfect addition to any witchcraft collection. Positive Energy Broomsticks (set of 6) Shaped likes a witches' broomstick, the shaft is coloured black, with a bundle of straw tied to the bottom. Dangling from the straw is a small charm, differing for each coloured broom. The perfect gift for any studious witches' apprentice, these pieces are cast in the finest resin and come with a card that reads 'Sweep, sweep, sweep the ground'.
